detail.description:
Are you the imposter - or will you expose them?

Imposter is the perfect game for groups that love fun, suspense, and a bit of deception. Playable with 3 or more players - no internet needed.

Each round, every player gets a secret word. Everyone? Not quite! One player receives only "IMPOSTER".
Now it's time to improvise: Each person gives a clue in one sentence. The imposter has to guess the word. The others must figure out who's lying.

Now with a brand new game mode: 'Find the Liar' - everyon
detail.releaseNotes:
Impostor Team Mode
Imposters can now see their teammates when multiple imposters are in the game - enable it in settings!

Player Groups
Save your favorite player groups and switch between them instantly - each with its own impostor settings.
